name: SCYNEXIS INC
summary: SCYNEXIS, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to advancing treatments for severe rare diseases, focusing on difficult-to-treat and drug-resistant fungal infections. The company developed ibrexafungerp (BREXAFEMME), the first FDA-approved triterpenoid antifungal, licensed to GSK in 2023 for VVC and rVVC. SCYNEXIS is also developing SCY-247, a second-generation fungerp antifungal currently in Phase 1 clinical trials, targeting invasive candidiasis and other fungal infections.

products.name: Ibrexafungerp (BREXAFEMME)
products.description: FDA-approved triterpenoid antifungal tablet for treatment of vulvovaginal candidiasis (VVC) and reduction of recurrent VVC, licensed to GSK in 2023.

products.name: SCY-247
products.description: Second-generation oral fungerp antifungal in Phase 1 clinical trials, targeting invasive candidiasis including drug-resistant strains; granted QIDP status and Fast Track designation by FDA.

partnerships.description: GSK licensed ibrexafungerp in May 2023 to commercialize it outside Greater China, Russia, and certain other countries.
Collaboration to commercialize ibrexafungerp in the Greater China region.
Collaboration to commercialize ibrexafungerp in the Russian Federation and certain other countries.
SCYNEXIS was dependent on Merck for establishment of intellectual property rights related to ibrexafungerp.
